---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, command, subagent, or other enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to add or change.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve or workflow does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you have in mind. If you're proposing a new skill or command, include a rough outline of what it would do.

## Resource Type

- [ ] Skill (`skills/`)
- [ ] Command (`commands/`)
- [ ] Subagent (`subagents/`)
- [ ] Agent configuration (`agents/`)
- [ ] Prompt (`prompts/`)
- [ ] Script / tooling (`scripts/`, `Makefile`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Agent Compatibility

Which agent(s) would this apply to?

- [ ] Claude
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Copilot
- [ ] All / agent-agnostic

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant context or examples.
